items.headline: Owen Tippett injury status update May 4 2026
items.description: RALEIGH, N.C. -- Owen Tippett will be out again for the Philadelphia Flyers in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Second Round against the Carolina Hurricanes at Lenovo Center on Monday (7 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN, TVAS, CBC).

items.headline: Rasmus Dahlin loving playoff hockey in Buffalo after long wait
items.description:
BUFFALO -- The things Rasmus Dahlin has dreamed about since arriving as a fresh-faced, soft-spoken future of the franchise in 2018 are finally happening.
The Buffalo Sabres defenseman couldn’t be happier.
For his first seven seasons, Dahlin, the No. 1 pick in the 2018 NHL Draft, has been done with

items.headline: Charlie McAvoy to have player safety hearing for actions in Boston Bruins game
items.description:
Charlie McAvoy will have an in-person hearing with the NHL Department of Player Safety on May 11.
The Boston Bruins defenseman is facing discipline for slashing Buffalo Sabres forward Zach Benson on Friday.
The incident occurred at 18:29 of the third period of the Bruins' 4-1 loss in Game 6

items.headline: Ridly Greig suspended two regular-season games for actions in Ottawa Senators game
items.description:
NEW YORK -- Ottawa Senators forward Ridly Greig has been suspended for two regular-season games, without pay, for roughing Carolina Hurricanes defenseman Sean Walker during Game 4 of the teams’ First Round series in Ottawa on Saturday, April 25, the National Hockey League’s Department of Player Safety announced today.

items.headline: Mats Sundin says risk with Toronto worth reward
items.description:
TORONTO -- Mats Sundin did not have to do this.
He once held the Toronto Maple Leafs record of 420 goals until he was passed by Auston Matthews on Jan. 3, and his 987 points remain first in team history. He played 13 seasons in Toronto and for many fans

items.headline: Tyler Seguin expects to be ready for Dallas Stars training camp next season
items.description:
DALLAS -- Tyler Seguin is expected to be ready for training camp next season with the Dallas Stars after tearing the ACL in his right knee on Dec. 2.
“I feel good,” the forward said Monday. “It was tough. I guess ACLs aren’t that common in hockey. It was hard

items.headline: William Karlsson could return to Vegas Golden Knights lineup in second round
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- William Karlsson will play for the Vegas Golden Knights against the Anaheim Ducks in Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round at T-Mobile Arena on Monday (9:30 p.m. ET; ESPN, SN360, SN, TVAS).

items.headline: Masterson Trophy finalists for 2025-2026 announced by NHL
items.description: NEW YORK – Buffalo Sabres defenseman Rasmus Dahlin, Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog and Winnipeg Jets forward Jonathan Toews are the three finalists for the 2025-26 Bill Masterton Memorial Trophy, which is awarded “to the player who best exemplifies the qualities of perseverance, sportsmanship and dedication to hockey,” the National
